name: German Kasekuchen
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, blend all the ingredients for the crust: sifted flour, butter, sugar, egg, and baking powder until well mixed.
2. Divide the dough into two portions. Use one half to line the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan and the other half to line the sides of the pan. Roll out or press the dough with fingers. Chill before filling.
3. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
4. Press cottage cheese through a sieve.
5. Combine cornstarch and baking soda in a separate bowl.
6. In a large mixing bowl, combine cottage cheese, sugar, eggs, lemon rind, and vanilla until smooth.
7. Add the dry mixture to the cheese blend well.
8. Stir in sour cream and raisins.
9. Pour the cheese mixture into the prepared crust.
10. Bake for one hour or until set, allowing the center to remain soft.
11. Turn off the oven and prop the door open. Let cool to room temperature before serving.
